A. carryall
B. safe

assistant

No 

To check if it is prime, we can try dividing it by numbers up to its square root. If any of them divide evenly, then it's not prime. 

15972 / √15972 ≈ 126.5
We only need to check divisibility up to 126.

15972 ÷ 2 = 7986
15972 ÷ 3 = 5324
15972 ÷ 4 = 3993
15972 ÷ 6 = 2662
15972 ÷ 9 = 1774
15972 ÷ 12 = 1331
15972 ÷ 18 = 889
15972 ÷ 36 = 444
15972 ÷ 63 = 253
15972 ÷ 126 = 127

15972 is divisible by 2, 3, 4, 6, 9, 12, 18, 36, 63, and 126. Therefore, 15972 is not a prime number.
